guide_notes_td_5: Bots can read, add, update, and delete notes via the API
guide_notes_td_7: All Entities on the same device can access all notes
guide_notes_td_9: User preference records, conversation summaries, Bot work logs, configuration memos
guide_remote_note_1: This feature is disabled by default. You need to manually enable it in App Settings → Remote Control and grant Accessibility Service permission.
guide_remote_p_1: Allows Bots to autonomously control your phone's UI. The Bot reads the screen structure via the Accessibility Tree and sends commands such as tap, type, and scroll. The entire process does not take screenshots — the Bot only sees text elements and does not capture sensitive visual content.
guide_remote_td_10: Scroll up or down on a scrollable element
guide_remote_td_14: The Bot can repeatedly capture screen → analyze → execute commands to complete complex multi-step tasks
guide_remote_td_16: Feature is OFF by default; requires user to manually enable it
